3. In the third quarter of the fourth chapter Jaimini gives
. some principles to determine the time of birth on the basis of

Pre-Natal Epoch 79
the time of conception. The relevant Sutras are:

Determine the time of birth from Adhana Lagna, Hora
lagna and the like. The lagna, according to the particular
navamsa has to be converted into minutes and seconds. This
refers to the lagna and its navamsa at the time of conception.
Then convert the seconds into Amurta Kala or Pranas.
Amurta is that which cannot be identified. Six Pranas
make one second. Then convert the above into anuliptas or
grades. One prana has ten grades (anuliptas, anukalas), one
Vilipta (second) has sixty grades. The number 2,4,4 are to
